action.reasoning: Observation: Starting with empty workspace (only data dir). Analysis: Must follow strict Habitat setup (chdir to /opt/habitat-lab-src before import, use read_write for exactly two config overrides, multi-agent action tuple, ignore data_path in predict and hardcode val/50/42). Heuristic policy using gps_compass is promising per literature (beats RL in budget). Decision: First write+run test_env.py to validate env, obs keys, metrics, signs for angle/turn, and get baseline random score + measure time before committing to predict.py/train.py.
